HERO.DESCRIPTION: Schedule diagnostic visits, track your results, and share them with your doctor — all through one secure platform.

STEP_1.TITLE: Register an account
STEP_1.DESC: Choose your role — Patient or Doctor. Once logged in, complete your profile: first name, last name, and (for patients) PESEL identification number.

STEP_2.TITLE: Book an appointment
STEP_2.DESC: The patient selects a medical test from the available list and submits a request. The system automatically assigns an available doctor with the matching specialization.

STEP_3.TITLE: Doctor issues results
STEP_3.DESC: The doctor views their active schedule, fills out the test results, and adds optional clinical notes. The patient receives an automatic email notification when ready.

STEP_4.TITLE: Access via link or QR code
STEP_4.DESC: The completed test result is publicly accessible via a unique secure hash — either as a webpage or a PNG format QR code, with no login required.

PATIENT.TITLE: Patient
PATIENT.LI_1: Completes profile details with name and PESEL ID number
PATIENT.LI_2: Browses the catalog of available diagnostic tests
PATIENT.LI_4: Tracks test history and past diagnostic reports
PATIENT.LI_5: Shares medical results via unique secure link or QR code

DOCTOR.TITLE: Doctor
DOCTOR.LI_1: Completes profile setup with medical specialization
DOCTOR.LI_3: Reviews their active real-time visit schedule
DOCTOR.LI_4: Issues official test metrics and custom clinical notes
DOCTOR.LI_5: Notifies the patient via automated email workflows

CTA_SECTION.TITLE: Ready to get started?
CTA_SECTION.DESC: Create an account and start managing your medical data today.

NEWSLETTER.DESC: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive up-to-date information regarding our latest services, clinical updates, and test offers straight to your inbox.
